title: Wither Storm Disc
description: Changes Music Disc 11 to The Wither Storm Theme from MCSM. This changes the texture, name, and music of Music Disc 11.
body:
Changes Music Disc 11 to The Wither Storm Theme from MCSM. This changes the texture, name, and music of Music Disc 11. If you have another pack that also changes Music Disc 11, it probably won't work.

Idk, I like MCSM.

Also, there's a bug where it doesn't play the full song, but I'll fix that laatttteerrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr...
